headline: Walmart makes a move to challenge Lowe's and Home Depot
summary: Hiring a professional to work on small home repairs can get expensive fast. A 2025 Angi’s State of Home Spending Pulse report revealed that of the homeowners interviewed, 71% said they have postponed at least one home project this year, while 58% said they delayed projects because of high materials ...
